description: Kraken is a cryptocurrency trading and financial services platform offering spot and derivatives trading, plus institutional and embedded financial infrastructure products. Its developer platform includes APIs and tooling for market data, trading, funding, account management, and agent-oriented workflows.
summary: Kraken exposes Spot and Derivatives REST APIs, a public remote MCP endpoint, and the kraken-cli with a built-in local stdio MCP server; REST and live CLI usage authenticate with Kraken-issued API credentials, and Kraken also offers OAuth client registration for delegated access flows.
